title: T-016 — Reference.DeptColumns Apex baseline seed (69 cols)
prompt:
# T-016 — Reference.DeptColumns Apex baseline seed

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §5.1-§5.10 (full 69 col matrix)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Seed Reference.DeptColumns with the full 69-col Apex baseline (Core 8 + Planning 4 + Commercial 8 + Production 19 + Technical 2 + MRP 13 + Procurement 5 + System 10) including blocking_rule, required_for_done, marker per §5.1 summary table.

## Implementation contract
New packages/db/seeds/dept-columns-apex.ts: a typed array of 69 entries (one per col §5.2-§5.10), each with column_name/dept/data_type/dropdown_source/blocking_rule/required_for_done/display_order/marker/schema_version=1. Insert as ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE keyed on (tenant_id, column_name). Idempotent. Includes Phase B.2 brief extensions (§5.3) and EVOLVING markers.

## Files
- packages/db/seeds/dept-columns-apex.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/dept-columns-seed.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given seed runs for tenant T1, when SELECT count(*) FROM "Reference.DeptColumns" WHERE tenant_id=T1, then count=69 (or 76 incl. brief extensions when feature flag on)
2. Given seed re-runs, when called twice, then count remains 69 and content unchanged (idempotent)
3. Given seed completes, when SELECT WHERE column_name='price', then blocking_rule='Core + Production done' (Phase D #7 tightening)

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for count, idempotency, blocking_rule correctness
- Run 'pnpm --filter db seed:dept-columns-apex && pnpm --filter db test dept-columns-seed'

## Risk red lines
- Do not seed required_for_done=true on auto-derived cols (e.g., ingredient_codes, equipment_setup)
- Do not skip System cols
- Do not change blocking_rule values from PRD specification

pipeline_inputs.description: Idempotent seed of 69-col Reference.DeptColumns baseline matching §5 PRD matrix.
pipeline_inputs.details: Typed seed array with all cols, blocking rules, required flags, markers, display order. ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for idempotency. Tests verify count, idempotency, key blocking rules.
out_of_scope: Do not seed brief field mapping here
Do not seed Reference.Allergens (separate task T-035)
acceptance_criteria: Given seed runs for tenant T1, when SELECT count(*) FROM Reference.DeptColumns WHERE tenant_id=T1, then count equals 69 baseline
Given seed re-runs, when called twice, then count remains 69 and content unchanged
Given seed completes, when SELECT WHERE column_name='price', then blocking_rule='Core + Production done'
test_strategy: RED: tests for count, idempotency, key blocking rule before seed exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db seed:dept-columns-apex && pnpm --filter db test dept-columns-seed'
risk_red_lines: Do not set required_for_done=true on auto-derived cols
Do not deviate from PRD blocking rules
